name: Pumpkin Oat Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda, and salt.
3. In another bowl, combine the mashed pumpkin, brown sugar, egg, milk, and oil until well mixed.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Fold in the oats and raisins.
6. Divide the batter evenly among a greased muffin tin or lined baking sheet.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool before serving.
